extra.reason: Completed context research over dpcode and OpenCode in docs/research/dpcode-opencode-grok-integration.md.
Implemented PATH-only JSONL provider MVP and verified local Pi text/json acceptance with grok-build.
Added separated unit/property/manual e2e test architecture with fast-check and real Pi text/json runtime acceptance.
Added pino-backed diagnostics, redacted debug/trace logging, categorized Grok failure surfacing, best-effort extension registration, and tests/docs.
Added honest provider metadata from , thinking level map, structured inspect details, command verification, and text-only provider input until image support is proven.
Added Biome lint/format/check scripts and config, formatted the codebase, added Effect dependency, and modeled Grok binary detection as an Effect API.

Implemented selectable JSONL/ACP mode via PI_GROK_BUILD_MODE, added ACP stdio JSON-RPC bridge, tests, and docs. Verified npm run check, npm run test:ci, and
